note: Every engagement starts with a short discovery call so we can size the work, agree on scope, and recommend the right paid engagement.

tiers.description: Architecture reviews, second opinions, compliance assessments, and troubleshooting sessions that turn uncertainty into a concrete next step.
Fixed-scope delivery billed monthly. CI/CD pipelines, IaC, containerisation, cloud migrations, and compliance readiness. A written proposal is agreed before any work begins.
features: All code delivered via pull request

tiers.description: Dedicated engineering capacity available every week. Buy consistent availability and same-day responsiveness, not just tracked hours. The most cost-effective way to keep delivery moving.
features: Flexible scope — shift priorities week to week
